docs.title: PR #105: Fix billing-service Stripe API version
docs.content:
PR #105 in prbe-backend: Fix billing-service Stripe API version
Author: alice
Description: Resolves SENTRY-1012. The Stripe webhook handler was expecting the old event field shape from API 2023-08-16. Updated to API 2024-04-10 format. The 'payment_method_details' field is now parsed correctly.

Fixes: Resolves SENTRY-1012
Test plan: Added integration test with mocked Stripe events.

docs.title: SENTRY-1012: billing-service 422 on Stripe webhook
docs.content:
Error group SENTRY-1012
Project: prbe-billing
Message: Unprocessable Entity: unexpected field 'payment_method_details' in stripe event
Occurrences: 3,847
Status: Resolved

expected_edges.note: PR #105 explicitly states it resolves Sentry error group SENTRY-1012 by fixing the Stripe API version mismatch
